Features

Everything you need to
navigate Qatar

A complete toolkit for finding, saving, and exploring any address in Qatar — all in one beautifully designed app.

Core Feature

Precision Address Search

Find any location in Qatar using the official Zone, Street, and Building number system — fast, accurate, and built for Qatar's unique addressing.

25
Zone
/
330
Street
/
12
Building

Live Google Maps

Visualize every location on a live Google Map. Drop a pin and navigate with turn-by-turn directions.

Save Favourites

Bookmark home, office, or any important spot. One-tap access — no re-typing needed.

Search History

Recent searches always one tap away. Instantly revisit any location without searching again.

Qatar News Feed

Latest Qatar news in List, Grid, or Reel mode. Filter by category, browse your way.

Secure Sign-In

Sign in with Google or Apple. Your favorites and history sync securely across all devices.

Inside the App

Every screen, perfectly designed

Explore the real Go Qatar app — built for speed, clarity, and every daily need in Qatar.

News Feed

Qatar News at Your Fingertips

Stay informed with curated Qatar news filtered by category. Browse in List, Grid or Reel view and tap any card to read the full story.

  • Categories: All, Qatar, Sports, Business, Tech
  • List / Grid / Reel view modes
  • Tap any card to read full article
  • Updated in real-time
How It Works

Find any address in
3 simple steps

Qatar uses a unique Zone-Street-Building addressing system. Go Qatar makes it second nature.

1
STEP 01

Enter Zone, Street & Building

Type in Qatar's official address format — the unique Zone number, Street number, and Building number. Our smart sliders make it effortless.

2
STEP 02

Pinpoint on the Map

Instantly see your location marked on a live Google Map. The map animates to your exact address — no confusion, no guessing.

3
STEP 03

Navigate or Save

Open navigation in Google Maps or Waze with one tap, share the location, or save it to your favorites for instant future access.

Qatar Address Format
25
Zone
/
330
Street
/
12
Building

Simply enter these 3 numbers and Go Qatar finds your exact location

Qatar News

Stay updated with
Qatar's latest

Read curated Qatar news in the layout you love — swipe through immersive reels, browse a visual grid, or scan a classic list. Filter by category and never miss what matters.

List View
Classic card layout with full article details
Grid View
Masonry grid for visual browsing
Reel View
TikTok-style full-screen swipeable feed

Upcoming Features

Go Qatar is getting even bigger

We're building an all-in-one Qatar super-app. Flights, hotels, and cabs — all at the cheapest prices, all in one place.

Coming Soon

Flight Booking

Cheapest fares in Qatar

Search and book the cheapest flights from Hamad International Airport. Real-time fare comparison across all major airlines.

  • Live price comparison
  • Lowest fare guarantee
  • Instant e-ticket
  • All airlines covered
Coming Soon

Hotel Booking

Best deals across Doha

Find and reserve hotels at the best prices — from luxury stays in West Bay to budget picks near Souq Waqif.

  • Best price match
  • Instant confirmation
  • Free cancellation options
  • Luxury to budget
Coming Soon

Cab Booking

Cheapest ride in the city

Book the most affordable cab in Qatar — no haggling, no surprises. Fixed price upfront using Zone, Street & Building.

  • Fixed price upfront
  • Cheapest cab guarantee
  • Track your ride live
  • Zone-based pickup

All in one app

Navigate · Read · Save · Book — all from Go Qatar

Notify me when ready
Go Qatar for Business

Need the Go Qatar API
for your business?

Integrate Qatar's most accurate Zone-Street-Building address resolution directly into your platform — delivery routing, checkout validation, field service dispatch, and more.

Delivery Routing

Resolve Qatar Zone-Street-Building addresses to GPS coordinates for last-mile delivery fleets.

Address Validation

Validate and standardize customer addresses at checkout — reduce failed deliveries instantly.

E-commerce Integration

Embed Qatar address lookup directly into your checkout flow — no manual address typing.

Field Service Apps

Power technician dispatch and on-site service scheduling with precise Qatar address resolution.

Appointment Booking

Let customers book home visits using their Qatar address — clinics, maintenance, and more.

Multi-tenant Platforms

Add Qatar address intelligence to your SaaS platform — real estate, logistics, and government tools.

What you get

  • Zone / Street / Building → GPS coordinates
  • Batch geocoding for large address lists
  • Webhook support for real-time events
  • Qatar-specific address autocomplete
  • Dedicated support & SLA agreement
  • White-label options available

Custom pricing

Pricing is based on API call volume and features required. Fill the form and we'll send you a tailored quote within 1 business day.

Your data is never shared with third parties

Request API Access

Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you with a custom proposal.
